QF.id: III-C Fraudulent and Unfair Trade Practices_1

question.text: The SEBI (Prohibition of Fraudulent and Unfair Trade Practices relating to Securities Market) Regulations, 2003 were made in exercise of powers conferred by which section of the SEBI Act, 1992?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Section 8.1, these regulations have been made in exercise of the powers conferred by section 30 of the SEBI Act, 1992. **The Trap:** Section 11 and Section 12 deal with powers and registration of intermediaries respectively, not regulation-making powers. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Section 30 is the general power of SEBI to make regulations, which is the foundation for all SEBI regulations.
